svg.content:
<mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="800" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0" /><mxCell id="1" parent="0" /><mxCell id="customer" value="Customer

End user placing orders and tracking shipments via web or mobile." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#08427B;strokeColor=#073B6F;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="120" y="60" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="admin" value="Administrator

Internal operator managing users, orders and configuration." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#08427B;strokeColor=#073B6F;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="420" y="60" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="threeM" value="3MRAI Platform

Three-microservice platform on AWS. User management, order lifecycle, shipment tracking." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1168BD;strokeColor=#0B4884;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="260" y="320" width="200" height="110" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="cognito" value="Amazon Cognito

Identity provider. Issues/validates JWTs." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#999999;strokeColor=#6B6B6B;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="700" y="60" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="docdb" value="Amazon DocumentDB

NoSQL persistence. One cluster per service, read/write replicas." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#999999;strokeColor=#6B6B6B;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="700" y="200" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="sqs" value="Amazon SQS

Managed queues. Decouples writes from Lambda CQRS handlers." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#999999;strokeColor=#6B6B6B;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="700" y="340" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="param" value="AWS Parameter Store

Secrets and runtime configuration." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#999999;strokeColor=#6B6B6B;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="700" y="480" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="cw" value="Amazon CloudWatch

Log aggregation and metrics collection." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#999999;strokeColor=#6B6B6B;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="120" y="620" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="signoz" value="SigNoz

Observability dashboards and alerting." style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#999999;strokeColor=#6B6B6B;fontColor=#ffffff;verticalAlign=top;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="420" y="620" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="r1" value="Uses (HTTPS)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="customer" target="threeM"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="r2" value="Administers (HTTPS)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="admin" target="threeM"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="r3" value="Authenticates (OAuth2/JWT)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="threeM" target="cognito"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="r4" value="Reads/Writes" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="threeM" target="docdb"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="r5" value="Publishes events" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="threeM" target="sqs"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="r6" value="Reads secrets" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="threeM" target="param"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="r7" value="Emits logs/metrics" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="threeM" target="cw"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="r8" value="Forwards to" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cw" target="signoz"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>
